AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS-
DEFENDANT ANTHONY FLORES AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLOW OFFICER OF PLAINTIFF CORPORATION TO VERIFY COMPLAINT PER CCP SECTION 446. =(301/JLW/DM) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANTHONY FLORES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - OVERRULED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE. DEMURRER WAS SERVED BY MAIL, ONLY 5 COURT DAYS BEFORE HEARING. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. (301/JLW/ju) (301/JLW/ju) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
